category.description: The category of the problem. Either `problem-list-item` or `health-concern`
category.title: Category

icd_code.description: ICD9 or ICD10 code for the problem
icd_code.title: Icd code

icd_version.description: Either `9` or `10`. If omitted in writing, default to 10.
icd_version.title: Icd version

info_url.description: External URL with more information about the problem, intended for patient education
info_url.title: Info url

notes.description: Any additional notes by the provider
notes.title: Notes

verification_status.description:
The verification status of the problem:
- `unconfirmed`
- `provisional`
- `differential`
- `confirmed`
- `refuted`
- `entered-in-error`

status.description: Either `active`, `inactive` or `resolved`. If omitted in writing, default to `active`
status.title: Status

problem_type.description:
The type of problem:
- `sdoh`: Social Determinants of Health (SDOH).
- `functional status`: Functional Status.
- `disability status`: Disability Status.
- `cognitive status`: Cognitive Status.
problem_type.title: Problem Type
